name: Spinach-Artichoke Dip (Chicago Style)
recipeIngredient: 14 oz Can Artichoke Hearts - Drain, rinse, chop
10 oz Pk chopped spinach - thaw, Drain well
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sour cream and 2 oz of parmesan cheese in a 2-quart casserole dish. Reserve the other ounce for topping later.
2. Stir in spinach and artichokes. Mix well.
3. Cover top with Monterey jack and the remaining ounce of parmesan cheese.
4. Bake for 15 minutes at 400°F. Then broil for about 5 minutes, or until cheese is golden brown.
5. Serve with tortilla chips and side dishes of sour cream and your favorite salsa. This makes about 4 times what you are served at a restaurant, so you may want to adjust the ingredients accordingly.
